2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.2.27 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3032.issue: [S3032] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v1.2.27" was found for current release 1.2.27. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/General/items/rct_refresh" attribute "label" uses key "Refresh interval" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

0085.issue: [S0085] No devDependency "@tsconfig/nodeXX" found. Consider adding one for proper type checking (see ioBroker.examples for examples).

0088.issue: [S0088] "/tsconfig.json" should contain an extends clause like "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json" (see ioBroker.examples).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^24.12.4" at [package.json](https://github.com/aruttkamp/ioBroker.rct/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
